amendments.title: Append-Only Rollback Semantics for GATE-01
amendments.change_summary: Replace VOID or reversal semantics with immutable ROLLBACK evidence plus partial-tail quarantine and CORRUPT_RECORD repair evidence.
amendments.review_note: Tier 1 approval received in-session on 2026-07-13. Durable actor binding remains required before operational activation.

amendments.title: GATE-01 closure - Artifact-Store Transaction / Rollback
amendments.change_summary: Close GATE-01 after CIC-TEST-REPORT-GATE-01-R2 passed 15/15 under ratified rollback semantics.
amendments.review_note: Tier 1 approved execution on 2026-07-14 and acknowledged inferred NTFS evidence. Remaining gates stay open.

amendments.title: GATE-04 closure - Cross-Process Lineage Locking
amendments.change_summary: Propose GATE-04 closure after process-level R2 passed 8/8 on NTFS.
amendments.review_note: Tier 1 ratified closure after process-level R2 passed 8/8 on NTFS. Runtime activation remains gated.
